title: Hoth (disambiguation)
content:
'''Hoth''' can refer to:

==Canon==
*'''[[Hoth]]''', a [[planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories]]
*'''[[Hoth (star)|Hoth]]''', the [[star]] the planet orbits
*The '''[[Hoth system]]''', location of both planet and star
*'''[[Hoth Stuff]]''', a [[fathier]]

==Legends==
*'''[[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]]''', a planet.
*'''[[Hoth (star)/Legends|Hoth]]''', the star of the [[Hoth system/Legends|Hoth system]].
*The '''[[Hoth system/Legends|Hoth system]]'''
*'''[[Hoth's Brand]]''', the star of the [[Hoth's Brand system|Ruusan system]].
*The '''[[Hoth's Brand system]]'''
*'''[[Hoth (Jedi Lord)|Hoth]]''', a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]].

==Real world==
*"'''[[Hoth (comic story)|Hoth]]'''", a comic.

{{Disambig}}
